channel.title: Eli's Bookmark Briefing
channel.description: Daily full-text readings of Jacob's bookmarked articles, curated by Eli.
channel.itunes:author: Eli
channel.itunes:summary: Daily full-text readings of Jacob's bookmarked articles.

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — March 4th, 2026
item.description: Full text readings: Cursor novel proof, iOS payment clarifications, model fog of war, AI hype cycles, Boom engine manufacturing, OpenAI GitHub alternative

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — March 4th, 2026
item.description: 7 articles: Cursor novel proof, iOS payment clarifications, model fog of war, AI hype cycles, Boom engine manufacturing, OpenAI GitHub alternative, bookmark briefing themes

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — March 3rd, 2026
item.description: 3 articles: Saving SaaS through creative destruction (Eoghan McCabe), Why you can't wait until later (Ryan Holiday), and OpenCode workspaces (James Long)

item.title: Bookmark Briefing — March 1st, 2026

item.title: [Fixed] Bookmark Briefing — Feb 28, 2026
item.description: 5 articles: NanoClaw AI Security, Claude-Native Law Firm, Anthropic Defense Debate, Lean Tech (Lovable), AGI Trades
